title: Refresh mission-control roster from live hcom
description: Follow-up to TASK-175 and TASK-177: mission_control_tui.py still reads shared/liveness-state.md, which can be stale unless liveness_reaper.py is run separately. Compose TASK-177's raw hcom normalization and liveness snapshot builder into a read-only live roster path, with fallback to the existing markdown snapshot when hcom is unavailable.
acceptance_criteria: Mission-control roster can be built from raw live hcom list JSON without writing canonical MAP state.
Dashboard snapshot prefers live hcom-derived liveness when available and falls back to shared/liveness-state.md when unavailable.
Tests prove the implementation composes liveness_reaper helpers rather than duplicating liveness classification logic.
Read-only structural guards still pass; no external CommandCenterUI edits.
